policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule new-tool-parity:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "Server/src/services/tools/**" or write "Server/src/cli/commands/**" or write "MCPForUnity/Editor/Tools/**" or write "Server/tests/**"
    notify write file "Server/src/services/tools/manage_*" if AGENT
    notify write file "MCPForUnity/Editor/Tools/Manage*" if AGENT
    because "new Unity MCP tools need Python MCP, CLI, CSharp implementation, Python tests, and Unity tests"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule feature-tests-required:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "Server/src/**" or write "MCPForUnity/**"
    because "features need tests before commit"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-direct-main-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "do not commit directly on main; branch from beta for PRs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule delete-not-deprecate:
    block write file "*_unused" if AGENT
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "when removing functionality, delete it instead of unused renames, removed comments, or internal compat shims"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule test-before-pr:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "Server/src/**" or write "MCPForUnity/**"
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "Server/src/**" or write "MCPForUnity/**"
    because "new features need tests and those tests should run before PRs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule nanobot-command-reminder:
    notify exec "pytest" if AGENT
    notify exec "ruff" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" if AGENT
    notify exec "nanobot" "gateway" if AGENT
    because "use the documented nanobot commands and run WebUI bun commands from webui when applicable"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule regenerate-js-sdk:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "build.ts" since write "packages/sdk/js/**"
    because "regenerate the JavaScript SDK with packages/sdk/js/script/build.ts after SDK edits"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-root-tests:
    block exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    block exec "bun" "test" if AGENT
    because "tests cannot run from repo root; run from package directories such as packages/opencode"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bun-typecheck-only:
    block exec "tsc" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" "typecheck" if AGENT
    because "run bun typecheck from package directories; never call tsc directly"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule prefer-dev-diffs:
    notify exec "git" "main" if AGENT
    because "local main may not exist; use dev or origin/dev for diffs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-silence-baselines:
    block write file "**/baseline/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/inventory/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/ignore/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/snapshot/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/expected-failure/**" if AGENT
    because "do not edit baseline, inventory, ignore, snapshot, or expected-failure files to silence checks without approval"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-concurrent-vitest:
    notify exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "vitest" if AGENT
    because "do not run independent pnpm test or Vitest commands concurrently; group one command or use a distinct cache path"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule test-worker-cap:
    notify exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    because "test workers must stay at or below 16; use OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 under memory pressure"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule new-surface-labeler:
    notify write file "extensions/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/channels/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "apps/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "new channel, plugin, app, or doc surfaces need .github/labeler.yml and GitHub labels updated"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule codex-harness-doc-refresh:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "codex" since write "extensions/codex/package.json" or write "docs/plugins/codex-harness.md"
    because "Codex harness upgrades must refresh docs/plugins/codex-harness.md from the new harness model/list snapshot"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-contributor-changelog:
    block write file "CHANGELOG.md" if AGENT
    because "contributor PR authors should not edit CHANGELOG.md; maintainer or AI adds entries during landing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule committer-wrapper-only:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "scripts/committer" if AGENT
    because "commit via scripts/committer with intended files only"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-stash-branch-worktree:
    block exec "git" "stash" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "branch" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "worktree" if AGENT
    because "no manual stash or branch/worktree changes unless explicitly requested"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule agents-md-only:
    block write file "**/CLAUDE.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/AGENTS.md" if AGENT
    because "new AGENTS.md needs a sibling CLAUDE.md symlink; edit AGENTS.md only"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule main-rebase-no-merge:
    block exec "git" "merge" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "main needs no merge commits and should be rebased on origin/main before push without chasing moving main repeatedly"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule commit-push-meaning:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "commit means your changes only; commit all means grouped chunks; push may pull --rebase first"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ship-it-sequence:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "git" since write "src/**" or write "ui/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "ship it means changelog if needed, commit intended changes, pull --rebase, then push"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-unexpected-delete:
    notify unlink file "**" if AGENT
    because "do not delete or rename unexpected files; ask if blocking, else ignore"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SENSITIVE = file "**/.env"
  source SENSITIVE = file "**/credentials/**"
  source SENSITIVE = file "**/live/**"
  source SENSITIVE = file "**/*.mp4"

  rule no-sensitive-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if SENSITIVE
    block write file "**/.env" if AGENT
    block write file "**/*.mp4" if AGENT
    because "never commit real phone numbers, videos, credentials, or live config"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule deps-approval-required:
    block write file "pnpm-workspace.yaml" if AGENT
    block write file "patches/**" if AGENT
    block write file "vendor/**" if AGENT
    because "dependency patches, overrides, and vendor changes need explicit approval; pnpm-workspace patched dependencies use exact versions only"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule carbon-owner-only:
    block exec "pnpm" "@buape/carbon" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "@buape/carbon" if AGENT
    block exec "bun" "@buape/carbon" if AGENT
    because "do not change @buape/carbon unless Shadow asks and is verified by gh"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule release-approval-required:
    block exec "pnpm" "publish" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "publish" if AGENT
    block exec "pnpm" "version" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "version" if AGENT
    because "releases, publishes, and version bumps need explicit approval; use the release maintainer"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule real-device-first:
    notify exec "emulator" if AGENT
    notify exec "xcrun" "simctl" if AGENT
    because "before simulator or emulator testing, check real iOS or Android devices"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule mac-gateway-managed:
    block exec "tmux" if AGENT
    block exec "launchctl" if AGENT
    notify exec "openclaw" "gateway" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "gateway:watch" if AGENT
    because "use pnpm gateway:watch, openclaw gateway restart/status --deep, and clawlog; no launchd or ad-hoc tmux"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule mac-permission-signing:
    block exec "**" "--no-sign" if AGENT
    block exec "**" "SIGN_IDENTITY=-" if AGENT
    because "Mac app permission testing needs a stable signed app path; no --no-sign, SIGN_IDENTITY=-, or raw debug binary"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule clawsweeper-ops:
    notify exec "clawsweeper" if AGENT
    notify exec "openclaw" "message" if AGENT
    because "ClawSweeper ops use the clawsweeper skill; deployed hook message tool replies must be exactly NO_REPLY unless actionable"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule run-doctor-for-migration:
    notify exec "openclaw" "doctor" if AGENT
    because "for rebrand, migration, or config warnings run openclaw doctor"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-node-modules-edits:
    block write file "node_modules/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/node_modules/**" if AGENT
    because "never edit node_modules"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule local-agents-ignore:
    block write file ".gitignore" if AGENT
    block write file "**/.gitignore" if AGENT
    notify write file ".git/info/exclude" if AGENT
    because "local-only .agents ignores belong in .git/info/exclude, not repo .gitignore"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PLUGIN = file "extensions/**/src/**"

  rule plugin-prod-boundary:
    block write file "src/**" if PLUGIN
    block write file "src/plugin-sdk-internal/**" if PLUGIN
    notify write file "extensions/**/src/**" if AGENT
    because "plugin production code must not edit core src, plugin-sdk-internal, other plugin src, or relative paths outside its package"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule externalize-plugin-proof:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "extensions/**" or write "docs/**" or write "package.json"
    because "externalizing a bundled plugin needs package excludes, catalogs, docs, tests, and proof before root dependency removal"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule doctor-fix-migrations:
    block write file "src/**/migration" if AGENT
    block write file "src/**/startup" if AGENT
    notify exec "openclaw" "doctor" if AGENT
    because "legacy config repair belongs in openclaw doctor --fix, not startup or load-time core migrations"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule plugin-sdk-compat-proof:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/plugin-sdk/**" or write "docs/**" or write "test/**"
    because "public plugin SDK compatibility needs new API first, named compat metadata, docs, warnings when useful, tests, and planned removal"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule migrate-internal-callers:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/plugin-sdk/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "migrate internal and bundled callers to the modern API in the same change"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule gateway-protocol-followthrough:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/gateway/protocol/**" or write "docs/**" or write "src/**/client/**"
    because "gateway protocol changes should be additive first; incompatible changes need versioning, docs, and client follow-through"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule config-contract-alignment:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**/config/**" or write "docs/**" or write "test/**"
    because "config contract changes need exported types, schema/help, metadata, baselines, docs, and raw migration or doctor-only compat"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule docs-list-first:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "docs/**" or write "ui/**"
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "docs or user-visible work needs pnpm docs:list first, then relevant docs only"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule repo-default-runtime:
    block exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    block exec "yarn" if AGENT
    block exec "bun" "install" if AGENT
    because "use repo default package manager and runtime; no swaps without approval"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule pnpm-install-only:
    block exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    block exec "yarn" "install" if AGENT
    block exec "bun" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    because "install with pnpm install and keep Bun lock and patches aligned if touched"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule sharp-libvips-install:
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    because "if Sharp or Homebrew libvips source build fails, rerun with SHARP_IGNORE_GLOBAL_LIBVIPS=1 pnpm install"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-raw-vitest:
    block exec "vitest" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    because "normal checkout tests use pnpm test variants; never run raw vitest"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule codex-test-wrapper:
    block exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "node" "scripts/run-vitest.mjs" if AGENT
    because "in Codex worktrees or linked/sparse checkouts avoid direct pnpm test; use node scripts/run-vitest.mjs or Crabbox/Testbox"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule codex-check-wrapper:
    block exec "pnpm" "check" if AGENT
    notify exec "node" "scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs" if AGENT
    because "in Codex worktrees or linked/sparse checkouts avoid direct pnpm check; run checks inside Testbox via crabbox-wrapper"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule triage-proof-required:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT
    because "fix or triage answers need source, tests, current or shipped behavior, and dependency contract proof"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule tsgo-only:
    block exec "tsc" if AGENT
    block exec "pnpm" "typecheck" if AGENT
    block exec "pnpm" "check:types" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "tsgo" if AGENT
    because "typecheck with tsgo lanes only; never add tsc --noEmit, typecheck, or check:types"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule oxfmt-not-prettier:
    block exec "prettier" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "format" if AGENT
    notify exec "scripts/run-oxlint.mjs" if AGENT
    because "format with oxfmt and repo wrappers, not Prettier"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule build-before-push:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "packages/**" or write "extensions/**" or write "package.json"
    because "build before push when build output, packaging, lazy/module boundaries, dynamic imports, or published surfaces can change"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule local-proof-healthy-checkout:
    notify exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "check" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "format" if AGENT
    because "small tests, lints, format checks, and type probes are local only in a healthy normal checkout"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule codex-no-local-pnpm-gates:
    block exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    block exec "pnpm" "check" if AGENT
    block exec "pnpm" "crabbox:run" if AGENT
    block exec "scripts/committer" if AGENT
    because "in Codex worktrees avoid direct pnpm test/check/crabbox:run and scripts/committer; prefer node wrappers and Crabbox/Testbox"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule broad-proof-remote:
    notify exec "pnpm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "docker" if AGENT
    because "full suites, broad gates, Docker, package, E2E, live, cross-OS, or Mac-heavy proof belongs in Crabbox/Testbox"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule prove-before-push:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "ui/**" or write "extensions/**" or write "docs/**"
    because "before handoff or push prove touched surface; before landing to main add issue proof and appropriate broad proof"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule dependency-contract-proof:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "rg" since write "src/**" or write "packages/**"
    because "dependency-backed behavior requires reading upstream docs, source, or types first; no API, default, error, or timing guesses"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule autoreview-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "autoreview" since write "src/**" or write "ui/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "pre-land or pre-commit code changes need autoreview until no accepted actionable findings remain unless exempt"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-landing-failing-gates:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "ui/**" or write "extensions/**" or write "test/**"
    because "do not land related failing format, lint, type, build, or tests; prove unrelated failures separately"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule metadata-diff-check:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "git" since write "docs/**" or write ".github/**"
    because "docs/changelog-only and CI/workflow metadata-only changes need git diff --check plus relevant sanity"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule prompt-snapshot-linux-node:
    notify write file "**/snapshot/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*.snap" if AGENT
    because "prompt snapshot CI truth is Linux Node 24; reproduce or generate in Linux when macOS drifts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule github-ref-clean-first:
    notify exec "gh" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "pull" if AGENT
    because "for pasted GitHub issue or PR, run git status -sb first, yell if dirty, then git push and git pull --ff-only"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule pr-refs-gh-not-web:
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "api" if AGENT
    notify exec "gitcrawl" if AGENT
    because "use gh pr view/diff or gh api for PR refs, prefer gitcrawl for maintainer discovery, and verify live with gh before mutation"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-unsolicited-pr-mutation:
    block exec "gh" "comment" if AGENT
    block exec "gh" "review" if AGENT
    block exec "gh" "label" if AGENT
    block exec "gh" "edit" if AGENT
    because "do not post unsolicited PR comments, reviews, labels, retitles, rebases, fixups, or landing actions"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECRET = file "**/.env"
  source SECRET = file "**/credentials/**"
  source SECRET = file "**/secrets/**"

  rule no-secret-output:
    block write file "stdio:stdout" if SECRET
    block write file "stdio:stderr" if SECRET
    notify connect endpoint "*" if AGENT
    because "live verify when feasible, and never print secrets"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule changelog-on-landing:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify write file "CHANGELOG.md" if AGENT
    because "PR landings or fixes need changelog unless pure test or internal; do not raise missing changelog as a review finding"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule pr-merge-proof:
    block exec "gh" "merge" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "ui/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "before merge, post exact local commands, CI or Testbox run IDs, before/after proof, and known proof gaps"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule issue-close-proof:
    notify exec "gh" "close" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "comment" if AGENT
    because "issue fixed on main needs proof comment with commit or PR before close"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule duplicates-before-close:
    notify exec "gh" "close" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "search" if AGENT
    because "after landing or requested close/sweep, search duplicates and comment proof plus canonical commit, PR, or release before closing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ship-issue-close-sequence:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "close" if AGENT
    because "ship that fixes an issue requires proof comment plus commit link after push, then close the issue"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule missing-deps-install:
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    because "when dependencies are missing, run pnpm install, retry once, then report the first actionable error"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule gh-body-file:
    block exec "gh" "--body" if AGENT
    because "for GitHub comments with backticks, dollar signs, or shell snippets, use a heredoc or body file, not inline double-quoted --body"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-pr-assets-commit:
    block write file ".github/pr-assets/**" if AGENT
    because "attach PR artifacts or screenshots externally; do not commit .github/pr-assets"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ci-polling-minimal:
    notify exec "gh" "run" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "api" if AGENT
    because "CI polling should use exact SHA, relevant checks only, minimal fields, and logs only after failure/completion or concrete need"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule dynamic-import-build:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "dynamic import changes need no static plus dynamic import for the same prod module, use runtime lazy boundary, run pnpm build, and check ineffective dynamic import warnings"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule import-cycles-green:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**" or write "extensions/**"
    because "keep pnpm check:import-cycles plus architecture and madge green"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source LIVE_DOC = file "apps/x/LIVE_NOTE.md"
  source ANALYTICS_DOC = file "apps/x/ANALYTICS.md"

  rule feature-doc-read-first:
    block write file "apps/x/**" if AGENT and not LIVE_DOC and not ANALYTICS_DOC
    because "read the relevant feature deep-dive doc before changing that feature area"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule shared-type-deps:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "apps/x/packages/shared/src/**"
    because "after editing shared types, run cd apps/x && npm run deps"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule main-restart-dev-server:
    notify write file "apps/x/apps/main/src/**" if AGENT
    because "main process changes do not hot reload; restart the dev server"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule rowboat-quick-commands:
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "deps" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "dev" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "lint" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "package" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "make" if AGENT
    because "run Electron app commands from apps/x or apps/x/apps/main as documented"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule renderer-hot-reload:
    notify write file "apps/x/apps/renderer/src/**" if AGENT
    because "renderer source changes hot reload automatically in dev mode"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule main-dependency-add:
    notify exec "pnpm" "add" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    because "add main-process dependencies from apps/x/apps/main with pnpm add, then import in source for esbuild bundling"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule verify-compilation:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "apps/x/**"
    because "verify compilation with cd apps/x && npm run deps && npm run lint"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule gofmt-after-go-edits:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "gofmt" since write "**/*.go"
    because "format Go source files after every modification"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule cleanup-test-build-files:
    notify write file "build/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*.tmp" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/test-script*" if AGENT
    because "delete unnecessary scripts and build intermediates produced during testing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule feature-work-on-branch:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "all feature changes should be developed on a branch"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-push-without-consent:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "do not push to the remote before user approval"
